name: List Databases
description: Show all databases in the server.

name: List Tables
description: Show all public tables in current database.

name: Describe Table
description: Show columns, types, and indexes of a table.

name: Create Table
description: Create table with serial auto-increment key.

name: Insert Data
example: INSERT INTO users (name) VALUES ('Alice Smith'), ('Bob Jones');

name: Select Filter
description: Query records with a filter condition.
example: SELECT * FROM users WHERE name LIKE 'A%';

name: Inner Join
description: Select rows having matching keys in both tables.

name: Left Join
description: Select all left rows plus matching right rows.

name: Group and Count
description: Group rows by category and calculate counts.

name: Create Index
description: Create an index to accelerate search lookups.

name: Transactions
description: Execute multiple SQL steps as a single atomic unit.

name: Subqueries
description: Nest queries inside outer select clauses.

name: Common Table Expressions (CTE)
description: Write temporary tables named blocks using WITH.
example:
WITH high_spenders AS (
  SELECT user_id, SUM(amount) as total 
  FROM orders GROUP BY user_id
)
SELECT users.name, high_spenders.total 
FROM high_spenders
JOIN users ON users.id = high_spenders.user_id
WHERE total > 1000;

name: Window Functions
description: Calculate ranks or row indexes across partitioned scopes.

name: JSONB Querying
description: Search values inside a JSONB document column.
